name: Stormly
description: European product analytics platform with AI-driven user journey insights and GDPR-compliant EU data residency.

seo.title: Stormly — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Stormly: European product analytics platform with AI-driven user journey insights and GDPR-compliant EU data residency.

when_to_use: GDPR-compliant product analytics with EU data residency
AI-driven user journey insights for European SaaS
Funnel analysis with privacy-first data collection
Session behavior analysis for product iteration
Retention cohort analysis for European mobile apps

pros: EU data residency for GDPR-sensitive teams
AI-assisted insights surface user journey patterns
Simpler setup than Mixpanel or Amplitude
cons: Smaller product and ecosystem than Amplitude
AI insights can be shallow for complex products
review.verdict: Workable GDPR-native product analytics for European SaaS that won't or can't use US-hosted tools.
review.best_for: European SaaS prioritizing EU data residency and simple AI-assisted product analytics.
review.not_for: Teams needing Amplitude-grade depth, US integrations, or enterprise-scale deployments.
